{{Quote|I believe it's safe to say that ''nothing'' caught between the conductor towers can ''survive--'' not when we generate the ''Omega Frost'', my dear brother.|Silas Tagge|<ref name="MSW32" />}}
'''Conductor towers''' were the transmitters which created the [[Omega Frost/Legends|Omega Frost]] effect. The effect happened between two of the towers, with no overflow. The original towers used on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] were smaller than the behemoths used in the [[Feswe Corridor|Asteroid Corridor]]. The latter were equipped with their own [[Force field/Legends|force field]] [[Force-field generator|generators]], although the fields did not extend below ground.
